title: New Docomo phone from 30
wikitext:
[]: New Docomo phone from 3.0             Quote Post by darthikari » Tue Mar 13, 2012 2:58 am Just like 2.0, looks like a new phone from Docomo is in the works for 3.0. Here's a link to the article off the Evangelion facebook page. http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/rss_det.cgi?news_c=11190&newsctg_c=1002

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Mar 13, 2012 3:54 pm I'm a sucker for black.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Mar 14, 2012 7:55 am Has some cool, dark optic to it, liker somethings that belongs in the dephts of terminal dogma. Now, if they gave us another cute artwork, like last time...

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Mar 14, 2012 10:19 am Want one, but I wonder if it will work outside of Japan. I am willing to bet that Anno will include this phone in 3.0 as a bit of promotion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 14, 2012 6:57 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: I am willing to bet that Anno will include this phone in 3.0 as a bit of promotion.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Mar 15, 2012 6:34 am KnightmareX13 wrote: Want one, but I wonder if it will work outside of Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Mar 15, 2012 11:35 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Docomo phones are SIM locked, I think that you can't use them with the SIM of another operator and maybe you can't even purchase them, you have to sign a contract with the operator to purchase the phone and it's probably hard to do so unless you reside in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 15, 2012 12:52 pm Docomo will unlock them for you, you need to sign something and pay like $40. There are also other ways to unlock but you need to buy a special SIM. I don't know if hypersims work on these new phones though. Still not going to be easy to get one, they really want you to go to a store to buy them and typically with Docomo, it's a 24 month contract where you must use that phone.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 31, 2012 10:35 am Pictures of the SH-06D phone at Anime Expo: http://www.evageeks.org/2012/03/a-look-at-docomos-new-evangelion-sh-06d-nerv-smart-phone/

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Mar 31, 2012 10:50 am That's one impressive EVA phone.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Sat Mar 31, 2012 10:52 am The interface looks surprisingly good but the back makes the phone itself look like a silly toy.

[]:             Quote Post by The Fourth Evangelion » Sat Mar 31, 2012 10:55 am So, this is Evancallion??

[]:             Quote Post by Mt Olympus » Sat Mar 31, 2012 12:42 pm I've never wanted anything so bad in my life!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sat Mar 31, 2012 4:45 pm That is far too cool. I want one.

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Sat Mar 31, 2012 8:59 pm http://www.evangelion.co.jp/nerv_keitai/ I wonder what the 3D thing is, and there's some kind of new studio cut color mention? (Going by crazy/wacky machine translation)

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sat Mar 31, 2012 9:03 pm Pretty slick. Also, the page on evangelion.co.jp seems to show it comes with a game... my translator plugin is broke, could anyone offer confirmation?

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Sat Mar 31, 2012 10:55 pm That's one badass phone. Me gusta! Question: Is Domoco the manufacturer? Now, I still have a thing for the previous phone which is a Sharp phone. Clam type cellphones are my thing. Which one looks cooler?

[]:             Quote Post by Mt Olympus » Sat Mar 31, 2012 11:25 pm deeRez wrote: http://www.evangelion.co.jp/nerv_keitai/ I wonder what the 3D thing is, and there's some kind of new studio cut color mention? (Going by crazy/wacky machine translation)

[]:             Quote Post by Amitch1991 » Wed Apr 04, 2012 7:36 am it looks AWESOME

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Sat Apr 07, 2012 5:59 am Cool idea, but that whole yellow on black-orange thing just looks like a difficult to use eye-rape.
